Hero.title: Websites and web apps, built with intent.
Hero.sub: I'm Johannes Brand — I design, build and ship fast, reliable web products, from the database to the last pixel.

About.title: A one-person studio — honest, fast, no filler.
About.p1: For the better part of a decade I have helped startups, agencies and small businesses turn ideas into web products that people actually enjoy using. I care about the details others skip: accessibility, performance budgets, and code the next developer can read.
About.p2: You work directly with me, not through layers of account managers. That means clear communication, honest timelines, and a codebase you own outright when the project ships.

Services.title: Services
Services.subtitle: Five things I do well. Pick one, or hand me the whole stack.

frontend.title: Frontend development
frontend.description: Pixel-accurate, accessible interfaces in React, Vue and modern TypeScript — fast on every device.

backend.title: Backend & APIs
backend.description: Solid REST and GraphQL APIs, auth, databases and integrations built on Node.js and PostgreSQL.

fullstack.title: Full-stack web apps
fullstack.description: End-to-end products — from data model to deployment — with Next.js and a sensible, boring stack.

wordpress.title: WordPress & CMS
wordpress.description: Custom themes, blocks and headless setups that editors love and that stay fast under load.

performance.title: Performance & SEO
performance.description: Core Web Vitals, clean markup and technical SEO that gets you found and keeps you quick.

Stack.title: Tech stack
Stack.subtitle: The tools I reach for. Pragmatic, well-supported, and chosen to last.

FeaturedProjects.title: Featured projects
FeaturedProjects.subtitle: A few recent builds. Click any project for the full story.

Contact.title: Start a project
Contact.subtitle: Have something in mind? Send a few lines about it and I'll reply within a day.
